name: subagents: review-node-observability suggested_fix references nodebestpractices §5.1 structured-logging citations (matches g-node-004 provenance)
command: mkdir -p src && printf "console.log(\"event\",req.body);\n" > src/handler.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/_runner.sh" --agent review-node-observability --input "$PWD/src/handler.js" --emit-findings "$PWD/findings.jsonl" 2>/dev/null && grep -E "nodebestpractices.*5\.1" findings.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
